reviews.comment: I took an BLS Provider course with Brian. It was a very informative course and I learned a lot. Brian was an amazing instructor. He was very engaging and made sure we knew the content and performed everything correctly on the mannequins. I would highly recommend going here for any CPR class that you need!

reviewReply.comment: Hi Sara, thank you so much for the kind words and the 5-star review! We're so glad you enjoyed your BLS Provider course with Brian. We truly care about making sure everyone leaves confident and prepared, and it’s great to hear that came through. Congrats on completing your certification, and thank you for choosing 910 CPR! We’d be happy to see you again for any future CPR or healthcare classes.

reviews.comment: Great working with them for fast and easy recert. Would recommend 10/10

reviewReply.comment:
Thanks so much, Amy! We're glad we could help make your ACLS recertification fast and stress-free—and it’s always great seeing familiar faces return for BLS renewals too. We know how valuable it is for healthcare professionals in Wilmington to have flexible, efficient training options. 

If ever a bundle ACLS, BLS, and/or PALS is needed in the future, just register for the 'higher'-level course and the other programs will be offered as options during registration. 


 Thanks again for choosing 910CPR!

reviews.comment:
Renewal of BLS:
The man was very professional, he asked necessary questions to be sure we knew how to perform CPR on adult and infant, and the difference between the two. He stood next to us to be sure we were performing CPR correctly. Overall he did his job and made sure we were giving CPR accurately and we knew what to do if we were put in a situation.

reviewReply.comment:
Ashley, thank you so much for the detailed and thoughtful review! 🙌

We love that you noticed the care and attention during your BLS renewal. That kind of hands-on instruction—right by your side, making sure it’s done right—is exactly what we aim for every time. We're all about building real confidence so you're ready when it counts.

We're glad we could support you, and we’ll be here when it’s time for your next round of superhero training 🦸‍♀️🫀

With gratitude,
Team 910CPR
